title: lithospermum diffusum var. erectum
intro: Lithospermum diffusum var. erectum, also known as Greek valerian or rock jointseed, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum diffusum var. erectum include reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
